title: The U.S. national soccer team advanced to the knockout round at the World Cup despite the absence of injured forward …
description: The U.S. national soccer team advanced to the knockout round at the World Cup despite the absence of injured forward Christian Pulisic, beating Australia 2-0 on Friday.
